Comment: inspect prod env file and running results-api env

commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && echo ENV_FILE && (test -f .env && sed -n "1,140p" .env || echo no_env) && echo COMPOSE_PS && docker compose ps && echo RESULTS_API_ENV && docker inspect $(docker compose ps -q results-api) --format "{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}" | sort'
